user_query: I would like to access my chat session history. Retrieve the message history inside my session for character ID 938545c6-ac0e-423b-93ba-39159fbfb866. Also, provide the list of sessions and their corresponding session IDs.

TaskList.description: Retrieve the list of all chat sessions and their corresponding session IDs.
Retrieve the message history for character ID 938545c6-ac0e-423b-93ba-39159fbfb866 using the session ID from step 1.
